interface_contract: undirected graph, 1-based dense vertices, one nonnegative edge weight per row; query groups are non-empty deduplicated vertex sets
transform: Reconstruct the heterogeneous keyword-search graph implied by the PrunedDP++ DBLP case study from the full official AMiner record stream: one vertex per paper and distinct author identity; one positive unit edge for each paper-author relation and each in-snapshot paper citation. Candidate labels are lower-case ASCII alphanumeric tokens from paper titles, source keywords, venues, document types and author names, deduplicated per vertex and retained at frequency 50..4800. Record missing-author-ID fallback identities and every count; do not substitute the Practical-paper coauthor graph or an author repository product. The unavailable 2016 bytes cannot be claimed identical, so the formal name is DBLP-AMiner-V18.
